elements.title: a British steam locomotive
elements.contents: ... that a British steam locomotive (pictured) sat at a logistics center in Kentucky for more than a decade?

elements.title: JoJo Townsell
elements.contents: ... that JoJo Townsell caught the game-winning touchdown in his professional debut, only two days after signing a contract with his team?

elements.title: an African elephant named Craig
elements.contents: ... that an African elephant named Craig had tusks that were so long that they reached the ground?

elements.title: Beverly Hills Register of Historic Properties
elements.contents: ... that the Beverly Hills Register of Historic Properties includes a storybook witch's cottage, a space-age gas station, and shops designed by Frank Lloyd Wright?

elements.title: The Witcher Adventure Game
elements.contents: ... that The Witcher Adventure Game was released simultaneously as both a physical board game and a digital video-game adaptation?

elements.title: Boubacari Dicko
elements.contents: ... that Boubacari Dicko, a non-sovereign monarch, helped to draft the 1991 republican constitution of Burkina Faso?

elements.title: 2010 Yazoo City tornado
elements.contents: ... that the 2010 Yazoo City tornado was considered to be the worst natural disaster to occur in Mississippi since Hurricane Katrina?

elements.title: Queen Matilda
elements.contents: ... that Queen Matilda drove Empress Matilda away from London so suddenly that the latter left her dinner still warm?

elements.title: a gay fan fiction about Minecraft YouTubers
elements.contents: ... that tribute videos, fan art, and memes have been made about a gay fan fiction about Minecraft YouTubers?
